sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 14:00:00+00');
SELECT event_id, time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 hour', event_time) AS bucket FROM events GROUP BY bucket;
UPDATE events SET event_time = time_bucket(INTERVAL '30 minutes', event_time) WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, time_bucket(INTERVAL '15 minutes', event_time, INTERVAL '5 minutes') AS offset_bucket FROM events;
